subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sanctified threshold! Your letter was received at a time when the most great ocean of tasks, tribulations and literary communications… the human spirit, in other words, the rational soul, is the intermediary between the immaterial and the corporeal
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید در وقتیکه این عبد در محیط اعظم مشاغل و غوائل
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @importance of community building, @power of the mind over nature, @the human soul, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
